title: EPI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 04 Assistant Manager, Manager, Senior Manager Posts
description: The Engineering Projects India Limited (EPIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 04 Assistant Manager, Manager and Senior Manager Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Civil Engineering can apply for the EPI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned ...
